route.module_a.description: Self-assessment path. The manufacturer prepares the technical documentation, declares conformity, and affixes the CE marking. No notified body is involved.
route.module_b_c.description: A notified body examines a representative example of the product (Module B), then the manufacturer declares conformity to that type (Module C).
route.module_h.description: A notified body audits and approves a full quality system covering design, manufacturing, and final inspection. Surveillance audits are recurring.
route.european_certification.description: Conformity is demonstrated through a product's certificate issued under an EU cybersecurity certification scheme (CSA).

notifiedBody.title: Notified body
notifiedBody.description: Record the notified body that is performing the conformity assessment. The ID and scope go directly onto the Declaration of Conformity.
notifiedBody.name: Name

steps.title: Workflow
steps.notesPlaceholder: Add internal notes, links to evidence, or audit reference.

step.checklist_complete.title: CRA checklist at 100%
step.checklist_complete.description: All applicable Annex I items on the checklist are marked Completed.
step.sbom_active.title: Active SBOM scanned
step.sbom_active.description: The active SBOM has been scanned and the CVE results are reviewed.
step.technical_documentation_prepared.title: Technical documentation prepared
step.technical_documentation_prepared.descrip: Annex II technical file is compiled: description, design, risk, testing, DoC.
step.risk_assessment_complete.title: Risk assessment completed
step.risk_assessment_complete.description: Product's cybersecurity risk has been assessed and documented.
step.notified_body_selected.title: Notified body selected
step.notified_body_selected.description: A notified body with the required scope has been engaged.
step.eu_type_examination_passed.title: EU type examination passed
step.eu_type_examination_passed.description: Notified body has examined a representative sample and issued the certificate.
step.conformity_to_type_verified.title: Conformity to type verified
step.conformity_to_type_verified.description: Production is verified to match the examined type.
step.quality_system_documented.title: Quality system documented
step.quality_system_documented.description: Design, manufacturing, and final-inspection procedures are documented.
step.quality_system_approved.title: Quality system approved
step.quality_system_approved.description: Notified body has approved the quality system.
step.surveillance_audit_scheduled.title: Surveillance audit scheduled
step.surveillance_audit_scheduled.description: Recurring surveillance audit planned with the notified body.
step.eu_certification_obtained.title: EU certificate obtained
step.eu_certification_obtained.description: Product holds a valid certificate under an EU cybersecurity certification scheme.
step.declaration_prepared.title: Declaration prepared
step.declaration_prepared.description: DoC text, manufacturer details, and referenced standards are ready.
step.ce_marking_affixed.title: CE marking affixed
step.ce_marking_affixed.description: The CE marking (with notified body number where applicable) is affixed to the product.

doc.title: Issue the Declaration of Conformity
doc.description: Generate the EU Declaration of Conformity, auto-filled from the product, organization, and notified body details above.
doc.stepsIncomplete: All workflow steps must be complete or N/A before the declaration can be issued.
